series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all identification and medical records for Division-owned canines including registration license, passport (if applicable), veterinary and vaccination records, and other non-training records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan all paper documents into OTIS and destroy ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years after the canine is no longer in service with the Division, then destroy. Copies of these records can be provided to the owner upon retirement of the K9, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
